::: lt-grid

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
Factorising — Simple
:::
::: lt-desc
Factorise $x^2 + bx + c$ using the sum-product method.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Sum-product]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Factor pairs]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Monic quadratic]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Factorising — Harder
:::
::: lt-desc
Factorise $ax^2 + bx + c$ where $a \neq 1$ using the $ac$-method.
:::
::: lt-skills
[ac-method]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Split middle term]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Factor by grouping]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Special Forms
:::
::: lt-desc
Recognise and factorise difference of two squares and perfect square trinomials.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Difference of squares]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Perfect square]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Pattern recognition]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Solve by Factorising
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve quadratic equations by factorising and applying the zero-product property.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Zero-product]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Set factors to zero]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Two solutions]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Quadratic Formula & Discriminant
:::
::: lt-desc
Apply $x = \dfrac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2-4ac}}{2a}$ and use $\Delta = b^2 - 4ac$ to determine the nature of roots and find unknown parameters.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Quadratic formula]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Discriminant]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Nature of roots]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT6
:::
::: lt-title
Completing the Square
:::
::: lt-desc
Write $ax^2 + bx + c$ in completed square form and use it to solve equations and identify the vertex.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Completed square form]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Vertex form]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Solve from CTS]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT7
:::
::: lt-title
Word Problems
:::
::: lt-desc
Form and solve quadratic equations from real-world contexts including area, consecutive integers, and even/odd number problems.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Area problems]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Consecutive integers]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Form the equation]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT8
:::
::: lt-title
Geometry Problems
:::
::: lt-desc
Apply quadratic equations to geometric problems involving right triangles, rectangles, L-shapes, and cuboids.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Right triangles]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Rectangles]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Composite shapes]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT9
:::
::: lt-title
Roots & Vieta's Formulas
:::
::: lt-desc
Form equations from given roots and use $\alpha+\beta = -b/a$ and $\alpha\beta = c/a$ to find symmetric expressions.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Vieta's formulas]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Sum & product of roots]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Symmetric expressions]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT10
:::
::: lt-title
Algebraic Fraction Equations
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve equations with algebraic fractions by multiplying through to clear denominators and form a quadratic.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Clear denominators]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Form quadratic]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Check solutions]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT11
:::
::: lt-title
Disguised Quadratics
:::
::: lt-desc
Recognise and solve $x^4 + bx^2 + c = 0$ and $(x+a)^2 + b(x+a) + c = 0$ using substitution.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Substitution]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Biquadratic]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Nested form]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT12
:::
::: lt-title
Surd Equations
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve equations involving square roots by squaring both sides; identify and reject extraneous roots.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Square both sides]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Extraneous roots]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Check solutions]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT13
:::
::: lt-title
Indices → Quadratic
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve exponential equations like $(b^{x+p})^{x+q} = b^k$ by equating exponents to form and solve a quadratic.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Equate exponents]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Form quadratic]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Exponential form]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

:::
